title: Enchant Display: Roman numerals
description: Adds a beautiful icon to your enchantments on item and books
body: ![Demonstration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sDjhAz4E/images/a5c60a6ba2af6f8e0321e0737a2f9a80e0e0b704.png) ## Enchant Display: Roman numerals ![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/993867255484010617?logo=Discord&logoColor=4791ff&label=%20&labelColor=383838&color=1baec2&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.gg%2FJNX3rvKYUv) ![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/900985?logo=curseforge&logoColor=8bc93a&label=Download&labelColor=383838&color=1baec2) ## 🔍 Information 🔍 📄 Versions: 1.14-1.21 🗨️ Language: All ⭐ Completed: 100% 💡 Idea: [punch](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/icons) ## 📖 Descriptions 📖 📋 **EN:** Adds beautiful inscriptions for your enchantment level and corrects the error with "enchantment.level.100". 📋 **RU:** Добавляет красивые надписи для вашего уровня зачарования и исправляет ошибку с "enchantment.level.100". ## ⭐ More Content ⭐
